top.title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
top.summary: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.

top.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
top.summary: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.

top.title: Dozens of dogs rescued and suspect arrested in Uganda after BBC investigation
top.summary: A BBC investigation exposed how scammers posted social content of dogs in distress to dupe donors into giving money.

top.title: Why big tech is betting on cute mascots
top.summary: The likes of Apple, Microsoft and Google are all putting cartoon characters centre stage.

top.title: Thousands of Waymos recalled after robotaxi swept into a creek
top.summary: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.

top.title: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
top.summary: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

title.#text: Microsoft’s Edge Copilot update uses AI to pull information from across your tabs
Trump administration defends right to ban content moderation experts from US
YouTube is courting creators — and sponsors — with streaming shows
